full_name: Standard Specification for Aluminum and Aluminum-Alloy Sheet and Plate
scope: Covers aluminum and aluminum-alloy flat sheet and plate. Data below is for the common structural alloy 6061 in the T6 temper (UNS A96061).

mechanical_properties.elongation: 12% min in 50 mm (2 in.), thickness dependent

license_note: Composition/property data for 6061-T6 widely republished by independent free sources (aluminum distributors, educational/material-property sites), not the copyrighted ASTM document text itself.
